boringofflinegames.title: Privacy Policy
boringofflinegames.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how the developer ("we", "our", or "us") of the mobile application <1>Boring Offline Games</1> ("App") collects, uses, and discloses information when you use our App.
boringofflinegames.intro2: Boring Offline Games is a mobile application featuring over 40 mini-games. We are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring you have a safe experience while playing our games.
boringofflinegames.intro3: By downloading, installing, or using the App, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this Privacy Policy. If you do not agree with this policy, please do not use the App.
boringofflinegames.section1ATitle: A. Personal Data Collected Directly by Us
boringofflinegames.section1AText: We do not collect, store, or share any personal data directly.
boringofflinegames.section1AText2: We do not require you to create an account, register, or provide any personal information (such as your name, email address, phone number, or physical address) to use the App. All game progress and local settings are stored directly on your device.
boringofflinegames.section1BTitle: B. Information Collected by Third-Party Services
boringofflinegames.section1BText: To support the development and maintenance of the App, we integrate third-party services. These service providers may collect, process, and store information about your device and app usage according to their own privacy policies.
boringofflinegames.section1BText2: We use the following third-party services:
boringofflinegames.section1B1Text: The App displays advertisements to remain free of charge. We use Google AdMob (provided by Google LLC) to serve ads. Google AdMob may collect and use information to personalize ads and analyze traffic. This data may include:
boringofflinegames.section1B1Item2: Device identifiers (such as the Android Advertising ID or iOS Identifier for Advertisers - IDFA)
boringofflinegames.section1B1Item5: Device information (model, operating system, language settings)
boringofflinegames.section1B1Footer: For more details on how Google uses your data, please review:
boringofflinegames.section1B1Link2: How Google uses information from sites or apps that use our services
boringofflinegames.section1B2Text: To identify errors, fix bugs, and improve the stability and performance of the App, we use Sentry (provided by Functional Software, Inc. / Sentry.io). When the App crashes or encounters an error, Sentry automatically sends a diagnostic report to us. This report does not contain personal identity information, but may include:
boringofflinegames.section1B2Item4: Date and time of the error
boringofflinegames.section1B2Item5: Stack traces and error logs describing the cause of the failure
boringofflinegames.section1B2Footer: For more details on how Sentry handles your information, please review:
boringofflinegames.section2Text1: We do not use tracking cookies directly. However, the third-party advertising partners (Google AdMob) may use cookies, mobile advertising IDs, or similar tracking technologies to deliver ads tailored to your interests and to measure ad performance.
boringofflinegames.section2Text2: You can manage your device's ad tracking settings (e.g., reset advertising IDs or limit ad tracking) through your device's settings menu (e.g., Google Settings on Android or Privacy settings on iOS).
boringofflinegames.section3Text1: Our App is designed for a general audience. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under the age of 13 (or under the age of 16 in the European Economic Area).
boringofflinegames.section3Text2: If you are a parent or guardian and believe that your child has provided personal information to us or our third-party partners, please contact us. If we become aware that we have collected personal data from a child without verification of parental consent, we will take steps to remove that information from our servers or instruct our partners to do so.
boringofflinegames.section4Title: 4. Legal Disclaimers and Limitation of Liability
boringofflinegames.section4AText: The App, including all its 40+ mini-games, is provided on an <1>"AS IS"</1> and <1>"AS AVAILABLE"</1> basis without any warranties of any kind, either express or implied, including, but not limited to, warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement. We do not warrant that the App will meet your requirements, run uninterrupted, be secure, or operate free from errors or bugs.
boringofflinegames.section4BText: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, the developer shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or any loss of profits or revenues (whether incurred directly or indirectly), or any loss of data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses, resulting from:
boringofflinegames.section4BItem1: Your access to, use of, or inability to access or use the App.
boringofflinegames.section4BItem2: Any conduct or content of any third party within the App (including advertisements).
boringofflinegames.section4BItem3: Any error, crash, or bug tracked or reported by Sentry.
boringofflinegames.section4BItem4: Any data loss, device malfunction, or overheating arising from playing the mini-games.
boringofflinegames.section5Text: You agree to defend, indemnify, and hold harmless the developer from and against any and all claims, damages, obligations, losses, liabilities, costs, or debt, and expenses (including but not limited to attorney's fees) arising from:
boringofflinegames.section5Item1: Your use of and access to the App.
boringofflinegames.section5Item2: Your violation of any term of this Privacy Policy or terms of use.
boringofflinegames.section5Item3: Your violation of any third-party right, including without limitation any copyright, property, or privacy right.
boringofflinegames.section6Text: The third-party service providers we use (Google AdMob and Sentry) are based in the United States and other countries. Consequently, your data may be transferred to, stored, and processed in countries outside of your country of residence, where data protection laws may differ. By using the App, you consent to the transfer of information to these countries.
boringofflinegames.section7Text: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last Updated" date at the top. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes. Changes to this Privacy Policy are effective when they are posted on this page.
boringofflinegames.section8Text: If you have any questions, suggestions, or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:
